hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && grep -rn 'import.*\.data\.' shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/strakk/shared/domain/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'ARCHITECTURE VIOLATION: domain/ imports from data/' && exit 1; grep -rn 'import.*\.presentation\.' shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/strakk/shared/domain/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'ARCHITECTURE VIOLATION: domain/ imports from presentation/' && exit 1; grep -rn 'import.*\.data\.' shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/strakk/shared/presentation/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'ARCHITECTURE VIOLATION: presentation/ imports from data/' && exit 1; exit 0
